reasoning: Koren, the primary focus for this workout is improving your lactate clearance and fatigue resistance. Your last ride was steady, which helped maintain endurance but didn't address your limiter. This session is tailored to prep you for the key climb in the Alpine Loop by enhancing your ability to handle extended efforts at threshold and above.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 sets of Over-Unders: 4min at 242-256W, 4min at 201-218W, repeat.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
